Columns.Name: 申込タイプ公開フラグ

ExternalDatabaseInfo.CreateViewSql:
SELECT main."顧客ID",
    main."グループID",
    main."申込タイプID",
        CASE
            WHEN (sub.special_note IS NOT NULL) THEN sub.special_note
            ELSE main."特記事項"
        END AS "特記事項",
        CASE
            WHEN (sub.default_set_flg IS NOT NULL) THEN sub.default_set_flg
            ELSE main."初期セットフラグ"
        END AS "初期セットフラグ",
        CASE
            WHEN (sub.private_flg IS NOT NULL) THEN sub.private_flg
            ELSE main."非公開フラグ"
        END AS "非公開フラグ",
        CASE
            WHEN (sub.order_type_public_flg IS NOT NULL) THEN sub.order_type_public_flg
            ELSE main."申込タイプ公開フラグ"
        END AS "申込タイプ公開フラグ",
    main."並び順",
        CASE
            WHEN (sub.active_flg IS NOT NULL) THEN sub.active_flg
            ELSE (1)::bigint
        END AS "有効フラグ"
   FROM (( SELECT main_1.customer_id AS "顧客ID",
            main_1.group_id AS "グループID",
            sub_1.order_type_id AS "申込タイプID",
            sub_1.default_set_flg AS "初期セットフラグ",
            sub_1.private_flg AS "非公開フラグ",
            sub_1.order_type_public_flg AS "申込タイプ公開フラグ",
            sub_1.sort_no AS "並び順",
                CASE
                    WHEN (sub_1.special_note IS NOT NULL) THEN sub_1.special_note
                    ELSE sub2.special_note
                END AS "特記事項"
           FROM ((m_customer_group main_1
             JOIN m_group_order_type sub_1 ON ((main_1.group_id = sub_1.group_id)))
             JOIN m_order_type sub2 ON ((sub_1.order_type_id = sub2.order_type_id)))) main
     LEFT JOIN m_customer_order_type sub ON (((main."顧客ID" = sub.customer_id) AND (main."グループID" = sub.group_id) AND (main."申込タイプID" = sub.order_type_id))))
  ORDER BY main."顧客ID", main."グループID", main."申込タイプID";
